evals.prompt: Find every callsite in this monorepo that bypasses the requireAuth middleware. Don't flag tests.
evals.expected_outcome: Claude assembles a task description with @src/ and @packages/ refs, exclusions for tests, and invokes agy-invoke.mjs with a long-timeout env (AGY_TIMEOUT_SEC=1800).

assertions.name: long_timeout_set
assertions.description: AGY_TIMEOUT_SEC is set to >= 600s (default) or higher for monorepo-scale audits

assertions.name: exclusions_explicit
assertions.description: prompt explicitly excludes tests (e.g. 'do not flag @**/__tests__/')

evals.prompt: Review the entire 800-page architecture spec at docs/spec/ — what's inconsistent across chapters?
evals.expected_outcome: Claude routes to longctx because the spec exceeds its own context; invokes with @docs/spec/ and asks for chapter-by-chapter consistency findings.

assertions.name: agy_invoke_called
assertions.description: agy-invoke.mjs is invoked (not codex, which lacks 1M context)

assertions.name: at_path_for_doc
assertions.description: prompt includes @docs/spec/ to pull the doc into Gemini's context

evals.prompt: What does the parseConfig function do?
evals.expected_outcome: Claude does NOT route to longctx. Single-file question fits Claude's own context.

assertions.name: no_longctx_delegation
assertions.description: agy-invoke.mjs is NOT invoked for a single-file question
